obligations: Example Digital Services Inc. shall respond to access/correction/deletion requests within 30 days
Example Digital Services Inc. shall notify the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada within 72 hours of a reportable breach
Users must expressly consent to collection for marketing communications
Employees must complete annual privacy training
Example Digital Services Inc. shall conduct annual penetration testing
Employees with access to personal information are required to complete privacy training annually and are subject to confidentiality agreements
Example Digital Services Inc. maintains an incident response plan requiring notification to the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada within 72 hours of discovery of a reportable breach
controls: role-based access controls and multi-factor authentication
annual penetration testing by independent third party
AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit
Employees with access to personal information are required to complete privacy training annually and are subject to confidentiality agreements
data_flows: Example Digital Services Inc. to Example Payments Corp. (payment data)
Example Digital Services Inc. to Stacklayer Cloud Inc. (platform infrastructure and database)
Example Digital Services Inc. to Insightful Analytics Ltd. (pseudonymised usage data)
Example Digital Services Inc. to Meridian Support Systems Inc. (communications data)
Stacklayer Cloud Inc. disaster recovery transfer to United States facilities
legal_authorities: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act, S.C. 2000, c. 5
